comments.text: We went in February because on my travel I never met a bad Irish person. Sadly me and my family didn't have a good time. We are from Morocco and went to Ireland to see Irish people. We went into a lctronics shop and my gaughter got knocked over by a shop lifter. The shop lifter ran right by the police and they did nothing as right behind them was a homeless prson asleep on drugs! I will probably go to eastern Europe next :(
